diagrams.title: Time Series Decomposition Model
diagrams.description: Shows how actual demand data is decomposed into trend, seasonality, and random components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the components of demand data for accurate forecasting

diagrams.title: Moving Average Smoothing Effect
diagrams.description: Compares actual jagged data with smoothed moving average line showing underlying trend
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how smoothing removes noise to reveal trends

diagrams.title: Exponential Smoothing Weight Distribution
diagrams.description: Shows how weights decrease exponentially for older observations at different alpha values
elements: Weight bars for α=0.9 (high recent weight)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding impact of alpha parameter on forecast responsiveness

diagrams.title: Growth Curve Types
diagrams.description: Shows linear, exponential, and S-curve growth patterns on the same axes
diagrams.purpose: Identifying and selecting appropriate forecasting models for different growth patterns

diagrams.title: Seasonality Detection Pattern
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how seasonal patterns appear in IT resource usage over weekly and monthly cycles
diagrams.purpose: Recognizing seasonal patterns for accurate capacity planning
